creator: niels=freebsd@bakker.net
text:
Hi,

Since upgrading to FreeBSD 10.4 and ipsec-tools 0.8.2_3, wildcard support appears to have stopped working. From the logfile: (a.b.c.d is the remote client's IP address)

2018-04-22 22:11:32: ERROR: no configuration found for a.b.c.d.
2018-04-22 22:11:32: ERROR: failed to begin ipsec sa negotication.

The WCPSKEY option is enabled for the port.
